title: Microsoft 365 Identity Management Training
description:
This Microsoft 365 Identity Management training covers concepts from the Basic level to advance level.  Whether you are an individual or corporate client we can customize training course content as per your requirement.  And can arrange this Microsoft 365 Identity Management training as per your pace.

Microsoft 365 Identity Management defend against malicious login attempts and safeguard credentials with risk-based access controls, identity protection tools, and strong authentication options without disrupting productivity. Microsoft 365 Identity Management includes topics: how to manage user security groups and licenses for cloud identities, and how to plan and implement identity synchronization, federated identities, applications, and external access. Microsoft 365 Identity Management is for those professional who have completed a role-based administrator course, such as messaging, teamwork, security and compliance, or collaboration, professional who has a good knowledge of DNS and basic functional experience with Microsoft 365 services and a proficient understanding of general IT practices. This Identity Management course is designed for professionals who are aspiring to the Microsoft 365 Enterprise Admin role and have already completed one of the Microsoft 365 role-based administrator certification paths.

Ø  Microsoft 365 Identity Managementuses Azure Active Directory (Azure AD), a cloud-based user identity and authentication service to manage user identities behind the scenes.
